programme.desc: Daniel gets jealous when he thinks Katerina is getting too much attention from Grandpere.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Who Messed Up the Treehouse?/ Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: Each kid brings their personal project up to the tree house, and each contributes to a huge mess. Sean and Sydney set out to show Mindy how to separate fact from fiction through research.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: Mz. Mole's Glasses: Elinor Stops the Squish
programme.desc: When Ms. Mole forgets her glasses at school, Elinor and her friends follow her to return them. During their travels, the kids realize Ms. Mole has been shopping and getting around using different senses.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Cupid Calls It Quits
programme.desc: Cupid allows Pinkalicious to become Cupid for the day so she can deliver valentines to everyone.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Masterclass Four
programme.desc: Mary and Paul re-create bakes from the final weeks. Paul makes a wheat-free crusty rye loaf and sweet and savory pretzels. Mary makes Sussex Pond pudding and choux pastry religieuse, and puts her own twist on the classic opera cake.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Miss Scarlet and the Duke: Memento Mori
programme.desc: A photographer specializing in post-mortem portraits gets menacing messages from beyond the grave. Eliza’s investigation takes her into the spirit world.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James volunteers to be the official vet at the Darrowby Show. His ordeals include an ethical plight involving Helen’s bull.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Long Song
programme.desc: The handsome overseer Robert arrives, sparking a bitter rivalry between July and her mistress. Meanwhile, the field hands rebel against Robert’s work demands.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Legacy
programme.desc: Family dysfunction takes its toll when an abused seven-year-old girl ends up comatose.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Taken
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl is raped during the gala opening of a high profile hotel.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Collateral Damages
programme.desc: An undercover sting leads to the takedown of an online pedophile ring and the arrest of two high profile suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unholiest Alliance
programme.desc: When one of their own is implicated in a coverup, the SVU struggles to unravel a sex trafficking operation deeply rooted in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fashionable Crimes
programme.desc: A young model is raped by a renowned photographer who looks to his successful brother to make her disappear.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assaulting Reality
programme.desc: The producers of a reality dating series make Benson and the SVU part of the show when they investigate contestant’s claims that she was raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Terrorized
programme.desc: A young boy is found wandering alone in Central Park, and the search for his parents leads to startling evidence of a planned mass-casualty event in the city.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Straight Up Steve Austin: Brett Favre
programme.desc: Steve heads to Mississippi to go head-to-head with NFL Hall of Fame quarterback Brett Favre.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Payback
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler discover that a murdered cabbie was once charged with ethnic cleansing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: A Single Life
programme.desc: When a woman falls to her death, the case is referred to the special victims unit.

programme.title: Dateline: Bad Blood

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Lokhay

programme.desc: A look into the early history of hip hop, with Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more. A look at Barry Gordy, the man who invented Motown and also the activism work of Nichelle Nichols ('Star Trek').

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: February 9, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: February 9, 2021

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Satan and the residents of Hell rise up on Halloween for the most raging costume party ever. However, Satan's fun is threatened by the antics of the most notorious serial killers of all time.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Two Shots: Move Forward
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a shooting, the team must use every tool at their disposal to find Alice Sands and bring her to justice before she destroys Jane's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dangerous Curve Ahead
programme.desc: While the entire Boston Police Department searches for Alice Sands, the team investigates a car crash that isn't all it seems. In the midst of all of this, a new romance blossoms.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cops vs. Zombies
programme.desc: The team works on behalf of the dead, and the undead, after a murder occurs at a zombie convention. Angela decides to pursue her GED after revealing that she never graduated from high school.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Post Mortem
programme.desc: When a mailman is killed, the team must work with a brash, eccentric Postal Inspector, who believes the mailman's murder is part of a larger conspiracy. Maura continues to struggle with the ramifications of her injury.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Shadow of Doubt
programme.desc: When a wealthy woman is found dead at the bottom of her stairs, we realize that this was no ordinary slip-and-fall accident. The team is pressed into a game of cat and mouse with a clever killer determined to get away with the perfect crime.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: There Be Ghosts
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must unravel an old ghost story in order to solve a double murder at a hospital. Angela convinces Frankie to stop avoiding Kent and accept his invitation to a concert.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dead Weight
programme.desc: When a bicyclist appears to spontaneously combust, Maura proves his bizarre death is actually a murder and helps catch the science-savvy killer. Meanwhile, Jane's invited to teach a class of FBI recruits at Quantico.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Black History Month
programme.desc: Meet Monique Rodriguez who runs the successful, black female owned hair and skincare line, Mielle Organics; Quick Bytes with Ralph Pagano--brings traditional Caribbean meat patties into your kitchen; what you need to know about vaginosis.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Some Kind of Miracle
programme.desc: One person's fight to live affects everyone at Seattle Grace, in the dramatic conclusion of a three-episode story arc.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Scars and Souvenirs
programme.desc: The race for chief heats up after a new competitor enters the fray as tensions escalate between Izzie and George. Meanwhile, Callie must reveal a big secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: An overweight owner of a jewelry store turns up dead in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: The Closer: Power of Attorney
programme.desc: What seems like a slam dunk case of rape and murder is fraught with peril. An aggressive DA and Brenda square off and the results will be a first for the squad.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: Major Crimes hurtles forward towards the mysterious and elusive mastermind in the Dwight Darnell murders while Buzz and Rusty's investigation into the murder of Buzz's father comes to an unexpected end.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Heart Failure
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a woman found in the river is impeded by both a secretive PI working for a tech industry millionaire, and Deputy Chief Winnie Davis, who regards Sharon as competition for the promotion.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cleared History
programme.desc: When Major Crimes discovers a young one-man geek squad in the middle of his Atwater living room with his throat cut, suspicions swirl around his roommate and some unwitting customers, all of whom he was blackmailing.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dead Weight
programme.desc: When a bicyclist appears to spontaneously combust, Maura proves his bizarre death is actually a murder and helps catch the science-savvy killer. Meanwhile, Jane's invited to teach a class of FBI recruits at Quantico.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind
programme.desc: When tensions boil over between neighbours in small-town Florida, a local waitress and her family fall victim to a poisoning, and investigators must track down the mastermind behind one of the most cunning murder plots they’ve ever seen.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed
programme.desc: A night of shooting begins in a quiet suburb, and when police speak to the man responsible they find he became unraveled over the sight of a few too many deer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Tickle's Engaged
programme.desc: Tickle announces upcoming nuptials, and Tim learns why his best friend can't stop being an outlaw. Mike tries a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law, and Josh bets that Sin city needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Mr. and Mrs. Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle finds a bride, but isn't sure if she'll love his moonshine. Mark and Digger deliver strong shine and sweet justice, while Josh smashes obstacles, and Mike gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Mrs. Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: When old friends embark on a risky bootleg operation, it's newlywed and former bondswoman, Mrs. Tickle, who can save them all from the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle's Guide for Love: Disrupted Plans
programme.desc: Mark and Digger deal with a Mason jar shortage. Mike and Jerry must return to land they've been warned off. Tim pushes his steam boiler to the breaking point with his scheme to repurpose a massive tank as an oversized pot still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Paid in Full
programme.desc: Mega Cash Days continues into Bracket 3 and all eyes are on Big Chief and Daddy Dave who are lining up in Round 1. Chief has never been able to beat Dave in a Cash Days and tonight he's trying to break the curse.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: High-Rise Window Washer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Hawaii to join the crew of the Worldwide Window Cleaning to help them clean some windows 40 storeys above Honolulu.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Toilet Crusher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Arkansas to perform tests on Alligator Snapping Turtles, the he heads to San Francisco where he removes and recycles toilets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reef Ball Maker
programme.desc: Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty in order to help create an artificial underwater reef. It's a dirty job that is helping to revitalize fish and coral populations in areas that have been devastated by pollution.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Big Animal Vet
programme.desc: Mike joins forces with a big animal veterinarian in Montana that has the dirty job of caring for sick farm animals, jumping into the role of apprentice veterinarian as he learns how to take care of a lama with an abscessed tooth.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: What it Takes
programme.desc: Billionaire Glenn Stearns provides insight on what makes a great entrepreneur, how to build a successful business and the importance of the American dream.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Can't Stop, Won't Stop
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns reveals how he pursued his dream of growing a business to a $1-million valuation in just 90 days despite hitting a breaking point that sent him to the hospital.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Gambling on Success
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns provides real-life examples of how to fund a successful business, including a gamble that proved to be his biggest money-making scheme yet.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Staying Alive
programme.desc: After nearly losing his startup funds, Glenn Stearns digs deep to expand his new businesses and what it takes to keep the dream alive.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Critical Fail
programme.desc: Glenn and his team have to rally to save their business and their livelihoods after a critical deal falls through and pressure mounts.

programme.title: Unpolished: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: Big Mike's passing and the pandemic have left Jen in a financial mess, putting Bria's fairytale wedding in jeopardy. Bria and Lexi collaborate on a client's unique request for her daughter's birthday. The Martone ladies go to extreme lengths for help.

programme.title: Unpolished: Party On?
programme.desc: Jen discovers a secret bank account of Big Mike's. At the salon, Lexi tackles a set of mermaid nails that proves to be a 'sink or swim' situation. Bria and Matt are dealt some shocking news that leaves the wedding hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Unpolished: Bad Business
programme.desc: While Lexi works hard on a unique set of amusement park nails, Bria remains distracted by her personal life. When the salon has trouble making rent, Jen has no other choice but to ask Lexi to step it up, which leads to a mother-daughter blow up.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Who Is Thyself?
programme.desc: Alex and Emma are excited to finally start attending high school classes in person, but being a freshman comes with its challenges. Amber encourages Anna to start substitute teaching while Liz presses her dad to let her start driving.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Slumdog Pavillionaire
programme.desc: After a day of disc golf at the park, the Johnstons are inspired to build a pavilion in their backyard. Trent takes on the project but realizes he may have bitten off more than he can chew. Then, the family gives Anna a test run as a substitute teacher.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Fat Baby News
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Whitney during an Asheville getaway, but then she discovers Ryan has been keeping devastating news from her. Then, Whitney is shocked by a surprised call from Chase and his baby daughter.

programme.title: Unpolished: The Maid of Horror
programme.desc: Old wounds are reopened as Jen and Lexi fight about financial tensions at the salon. Meanwhile, Bria focuses on throwing an extravagant bridal shower as Lexi works hard to finish a challenging 3D nail set, causing the divide between the sisters to grow.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Rebirth
programme.desc: The final stages are set for Jazz to undergo the most significant procedure of her entire life, gender confirmation surgery. Her doctors provide the final details of this highly experimental and potentially complicated operation.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: It's a Girl!
programme.desc: Jazz's doctors perform her ground-breaking bottom surgery while her family anxiously awaits news. With the OK from her doctors Jazz is released to recover in a hotel.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Last Time This Happened We Had Quints!
programme.desc: With Danielle's health concerns growing, Adam reveals a huge secret which could mean she's actually pregnant. The couple's stress soars when one of the quints goes missing. Blayke opens a lemonade stand and the family is eager to help.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: OutValentined
programme.desc: Adam faces the challenge of pleasing his wife and all six of his daughters for Valentine's Day. Then, Adam and Danielle are stunned by what they learn at Hazel's doctor appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Saralyn is in need of two dresses in order to share her wedding with her sister Megan who has Down syndrome.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Better Than the First
programme.desc: Mackenzie is on the hunt for a third dress to replace the two she already has. Kelly is looking for a dress that can outdo the one she found, which is over her budget. Rachael is looking to replace a lace mermaid gown she bought and now can't stand.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Sister Wives: A Breaking Point
programme.desc: Just as Robyn's family has adjusted to Flagstaff they learn that the owner is selling their rental house and they have 60 days to leave. Robyn and Kody fight in front of the kids over it and Aurora has a full-on panic attack, perhaps her worst ever.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Gay and Religious
programme.desc: The sister wives visit Mariah and her fiancée, Audrey, in Chicago. Meri opens up about how badly she behaved when Mariah first came out as gay and Mariah confesses about her struggles growing up gay in their polygamist church.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: As Bad As It Gets
programme.desc: After more than twenty years in the same apartment, compulsive hoarder Randy is being forced to leave by order of his landlord, and must somehow clear out the eight-foot-high mountains of stuff in a few days.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa's Story
programme.desc: Jennifer and her daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. See if Jennifer can regain control and save both their lives before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Movie: The Break Up
programme.desc: A woman, who feels neglected and unappreciated by her boyfriend, breaks out of their relationship in an effort to make him miss her. When he misunderstands her intent, war ensues, with both of them refusing to move out of their newly purchased condo.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Tossed Aside
programme.desc: When they met at a cheer competition six years ago, Trey and Austin became instant best bros. While Trey identifies as gay and Austin is straight, the two bonded over their mutual love for cheering and always helped each other.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Patience is Patience
programme.desc: When Mackenzie's father needs to have quadruple bypass surgery, her plans to move to Florida are put on pause. Maci worries about Bentley's performance in school, while Catelynn and Tyler contemplate having another child.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Ghost Gone AWOL
programme.desc: Naimah and Maher were two class clowns who became instant friends in the seventh grade, and even attempted to date, but when Naimah joined the Air Force, their attempts to keep their friendship alive dwindled.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bella Twins
programme.desc: Twin divas Nicole and Brianna stop by the set to show some of their backyard wrestling moves and how to make a perfect pain angel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome rap superstar Tyga as they watch some people 'get a taste', witness what could go wrong when you 'make it haute' and find out what kind of talents can make you legendary'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Peyton List
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo welcome actress Peyton List to find out who is 'Not Quite Cobras', experience '27 Messes', and rev it up with some 'Extreme Grandmas'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo say a few prayers while they preach free, get fully committed, and feel the weight of the world.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jagger Eaton
programme.desc: Rob show skateboard prodigy Jagger Eaton some 'mega dumps.' discovers some 'magnet feet,' and they all learn how to build 'budget skate parks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling C
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo meet up for some "drunch," witness people who are both naked and unafraid, and pour themselves a tall glass of swag juice.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Freedia
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome Big Freedia to get it shaking with 'azz everywhere,' get drunk and dangerous with 'gin victims' and find out what it means to be 'here to stay.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXXVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo find out what happens when you suffer from 'blindsight', save some coin by performing 'DIY plastic surgery' and celebrate family with the 'joys of parenting'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tank

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo hire some seeing eye friends, get entranced by hypno-beasts and experience down-south dads.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyler Posey
programme.desc: Rob welcomes 'Teen Wolf' star Tyler Posey as they give a salute to modern 'Fartistry,' talk about what it's like to have 'Wolfsense' and teach us to 'Say No to Buds.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo get jammed up in Stuck My Life, take their chances in Gator Gamblin' and enlist in the gravy seals.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Trevor Jackson
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by actor and musician Trevor Jackson as they check out some "Superfly Action Heroes," and see what happens when plans go wrong with "Rough Drafts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo have a case of "The Mondays," hop on with some "Free Riders," and finally admit "It's Over."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Riff Raff
programme.desc: Rapper Riff Raff shows off his brain freeze.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIX
programme.desc: The trio prepare for World War Bee, become medical experts with a diagnosis of Backflip Block and work to avoid stray tires when venturing through The Wheel World.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chris Drama Pfaff
programme.desc: Rob's cousin Drama helps Rob break down Family Dysfunction and Little Rollers. Learn whether Parkour is an art or just some aggressive running.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nerdiculousness
programme.desc: A celebration of the smart people who make the world a better place includes a look at some lesser-known 'nerdachievements.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nina Agdal
programme.desc: Rob exposes supermodel Nina Agdal's 'private weirdness' while she goes 'beast mode' and basks in the glory of the world's most 'talented butts.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo breakdown some 'breakaways', do 'anything but walking' and get 'life sync'd'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Shively
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some 'paranorm-ish activity,' do some 'attempted man' and meet some animals that are 'milk ready.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LVIII

programme.title: Friends: The One With Five Steaks and An Eggplant

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Babysitting, Joey and Chandler take baby Ben out on the town to help them attract women, but they lose him on the bus.

programme.desc: The gang attends the wedding of Ross's ex-wife where Monica is the caterer.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video

programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Chinchilla Chill Pad
programme.desc: Antonio and his team design and build an elaborate system of tunnels and towers spanning two rooms for a family and their seven adorable, fluffy chinchillas.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Bunny Beach Bungalow
programme.desc: Antonio meets a couple whose home has been taken over by their rescued bunnies. He'll transform their overgrown backyard into a beach-themed oasis for humans and bunnies, complete with predator-proof enclosures.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Pot-bellied Pig Palace
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family and their pot-bellied pig who has turned their front yard into a dustbowl. Antonio goes hog wild and designs the ultimate piggy paradise with a new pig house, mud pit, space to run and an activity wall to keep Mr. Pickles happy.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Emerald Paradise
programme.desc: A couple has many requests when transforming their backyard into their dream Caribbean vacation spot that includes a pair of waterfalls and more. Later, a family's outdated pool is converted into stunning outdoor space with a rock waterwall and grotto.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: The Ultimate Abode
programme.desc: An Alaskan adventure-seeking couple tasks Pete to build a custom arboreal abode complete with a sauna for next-level rest and relaxation. Later, NTS transforms a couple of mountaineers' 200-acre Kentucky property into the ultimate climber's haven.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Emerald Paradise
programme.desc: A couple has many requests when transforming their backyard into their dream Caribbean vacation spot that includes a pair of waterfalls and more. Later, a family's outdated pool is converted into stunning outdoor space with a rock waterwall and grotto.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: The Ultimate Abode
programme.desc: An Alaskan adventure-seeking couple tasks Pete to build a custom arboreal abode complete with a sauna for next-level rest and relaxation. Later, NTS transforms a couple of mountaineers' 200-acre Kentucky property into the ultimate climber's haven.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppy Power
programme.desc: Little Roo is the smallest of a litter of Beagles, but proves to his much bigger sisters that he is top dog. A litter of super fluffy Bichon Frise pups follow mom's path to show dog stardom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!
programme.desc: Jackson experiences his most vicious, and most illuminating, cat attack of not just the season, but in years, at the claws of a troubled cat named May. Also, the Cat Daddy must help a nervous-wreck of a cat guardian move her two very feral cats to Canada.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Rare okapi Stomp must woo female K'Tusha, there's a struggle to be pack leader among the African painted dogs, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two new prospective mates.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Scottish Sky Garden
programme.desc: The team tackles a Tulsa build in kilts to create a Scottish cottage in a robust pin oak. Pete builds his first ever 'sky bridge' that connects the couple's home directly to their new treetop paradise.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tank This!
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde revisit some of the most unthinkable items the ATM crew has turned into tanks over the years. They share never before seen footage that documents the challenge of creating some of the most unconventional tanks.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Why We Go On
programme.desc: Tia battles a local shelter on the fate of a pit bull she risked it all to save. Another dog that was rescued from death has a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blind Hope
programme.desc: When a blind pit bull is attacked by other dogs, the Villalobos team steps-in and takes responsibility for his recovery. Also, a couple from Pittsburgh mourning the loss of their pit bull visits Villalobos and fall in love with one of Tia's favorite dogs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Three couples take a week-long vacation to figure out why they got married.

programme.title: Martin: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is a Beach
programme.desc: Martin and Gina escape the pandemonium at home and finally have the perfect wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Martin: Martin in the Corner Pocket
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over for Gina when Martin stays out one night, playing pool and getting hustled until he loses even the clothes off his back.

programme.title: Martin: Kill Him with Kindness
programme.desc: Martin thinks Gina wants to kill him for life insurance money.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Buried Pleasure
programme.desc: Holt admits to Cleveland that he wishes he had a special someone in his life. Determined to help his lonely friend, Cleveland introduces Holt to the cat-loving redhead Jill. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo anticipate the 'birth' of Rallo's pet fish.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Curious Case of Jr. Working at The Stool
programme.desc: A feud erupts between father and son when Cleveland Jr. gets a job at Cleveland's preferred bar and begins judging his father's drinking habits. Meanwhile, Roberta competes with the rich girl in school.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Once Upon a Tyne in New York
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna take a road trip to the Big Apple for an overdue honeymoon, and to Donna's dismay, Cleveland allows the Stoolbend gang to tag along to help Coach McFall rekindle a long lost romance.

programme.title: The Parkers: Blind Date Mistake
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim go on a blind date with a father-son duo when they appear on 'Blind Date.'

programme.title: The Parkers: Who's Your Mamma?
programme.desc: A young woman named Samantha McGee claims that she and Kim were switched at birth.

programme.title: The Parkers: Hands Off, Grandma
programme.desc: Nikki's grandma comes to visit and causes friction when she tries to seduce Prof. Oglevee.

programme.title: The Parkers: Single Black Female

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown Knight
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Donna are mugged at an ATM, Cleveland is accidentally wounded in the tussle. By the time the story hits the local news, the attention goes to Cleveland's head, but Cleveland's version isn't the whole story.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Gone With the Wind
programme.desc: When Cleveland is diagnosed with high cholesterol, Donna puts him on a new high-fibre diet, which causes an intestinal backlash. It may stink up the place, but Cleveland quickly realizes his gas might score him points in the karaoke contest.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Acting as his brother's wingman, Rallo gives Cleveland Jr. a few pointers on how to win over the girl of his dreams, Chanel. Although when Cleveland Jr. finds out her boyfriend is local rap star Kenny West, he challenges Kenny to a rap battle.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown History Month
programme.desc: Cleveland and Cleveland Jr. teach Donna and the kids their tradition of celebrating Black History Month. However, when Rallo learns about his heritage at school, he provokes Cleveland into a battle royale with his neighbour.

programme.title: Black-ish: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Gun

programme.title: Black-ish: Dr. Hell No

programme.title: The Parkers: Kim Who?

programme.title: The Parkers: In Sickness and in Health

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?

programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: An Old Rancher Gets a Chef-Inspired Facelift
programme.desc: Two restaurant owners live in the house her grandfather built, but it's too old-fashioned for their taste and two active boys. When they call on Dave and Jenny to update their outdated ranch, the results are inspiring, modern and ready for entertaining.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Deano and Carissa: A Scratch Made in Heaven
programme.desc: After winning a state-record $7 million on a single scratch ticket, an Midwest dad hunts for the perfect family home for his partner and kids in their current rural Indiana neighborhood.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Canadian Dream
programme.desc: After winning over $1.7 million, Lana and Shannon want to move back to their hometown in British Columbia, Canada.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Buy Now, Inherit Later
programme.desc: A construction worker that won $250,000 calls on David Bromstad to help him find a home close to his eight adult daughters. One daughter joins the house hunt and looks for a place that has projects to keep them busy and space for the grandkids to visit.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lake House Lottery
programme.desc: A couple's lakeside retirement dream is now a reality after they scratched up $1 million on a Massachusetts scratch-off ticket.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Payday in V-A
programme.desc: An attorney and single father of a three-year-old son scored $1 million on the mega millions. Now he's ready to move out of his rental and find the perfect father-son forever home in beautiful Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Florida Dreaming
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a Florida scratcher, a husband and wife realize their dream of owning a house and land in North Port, Florida. She wants a gourmet kitchen and resort pool and he wants a huge backyard to grow fruit trees.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mountain High Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida couple receives an inheritance from a long-lost relative that leaves them $900,000 richer. They struggle to agree on a budget for a mountain vacation home in Blue Ridge, GA, so David Bromstad steps in to help them find something they both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The House Always Wins

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: IT Geek to Rich and Chic

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Lottery Queen

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: South Shore Score

programme.desc: Booker and Nia want to attend a high school party that Tess is going to, but Raven has already set up a game night.

programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.desc: Ross and the kids are determined to make the Kikiwaka lobster festival great.

programme.desc: Matteo and Finn find a strange collection of bones that they think is from a new species.

programme.desc: Max is fed up with Sydney missing her curfew multiple times and grounds her right before the one-night-only Pop-Up cake museum that all of her friends are attending.

programme.desc: When a defense attorney is murdered after a fundraiser, Intelligence confronts the world of corporate finance which makes them reconsider their decision to back the current pro-police mayoral candidate.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Outrage
programme.desc: While chasing a heroin supplier, CPD crosses paths with a convicted criminal recently released on a technicality. Halstead's history with the man threatens the team's ability to put him back in prison.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Night in Chicago
programme.desc: Atwater goes undercover to bring down the longtime head of a criminal enterprise and becomes entangled in a situation that tests his allegiances as well as his conscience.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: The team travels to a Wisconsin gun show to take down a supplier who's manufacturing 'cop killer' machine guns. Before going undercover together, Burgess discovers that Upton is dating Ruzek.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Good Men
programme.desc: Using information from Chicago Fire's Cruz, Intelligence chases down the robbery crew using the lockbox key. Voight is under pressure to bring the crew to justice without tarnishing the reputation of a murdered firefighter who might have been involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Forgotten
programme.desc: Voight's 'stay out of politics' stance is challenged as Intelligence uncovers the details surrounding a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Pain Killer
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate is shot by an unidentified sniper and CPD races to catch the shooter before he can take out his next target.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: This City
programme.desc: With the threat of a gang war looming, Voight and Ray Price must organize a peace summit to end the bloodshed before more innocent people get hurt. Burgess evaluates her future with Blair.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been
programme.desc: Intelligence's investigation into the murder of Burgess's boyfriend threatens to reveal a dark side she was unaware of. The real motivation for his murder uncovers a much more unsettling truth.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sacrifice
programme.desc: A violent crew is hitting pharmaceutical delivery trucks and stealing drugs, but their motivation is more complicated than just money. The case tests Upton and Ruzek’s relationship.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confession
programme.desc: Antonio struggles with his guilty conscience as he tries to take down a major drug dealer. In order to protect his team, Voight takes a big shot at Kelton.

programme.title: Kim Kardashian West: The Justice Project
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian West talks to prison inmates who recount their stories of landing behind bars.

programme.desc: A confrontation between enemies turns deadly, and Lt. Joe Kenda's best hope for answers lies with a grainy, dubbed-over surveillance tape. Then An elderly man is fighting for his life. Was it a slip-and-fall, or something infinitely more disturbing?

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Suspicion: The Case Against Mary Katherine Higdon
programme.desc: A young woman tells police she accidentally shot her boyfriend, and later police say she confessed to the murder. But there is a major problem with a key piece of evidence.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Suspicion: The Case Against Mary Katherine Higdon
programme.desc: A young woman tells police she accidentally shot her boyfriend, and later police say she confessed to the murder. But there is a major problem with a key piece of evidence.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Death by Design
programme.desc: A couple's fight reaches a tragic end when one of them is shot. A tape recorder that's captured final words becomes evidence in a murder trial. When more tapes are found, the jury must examine a violent history and decide the fate of a possible murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: A father has his daughter's life all planned out - with secrets hiding at home & high hopes for the future, it will end in terror. Later, when sinister forces are at work, even a father's love to his daughter has its limits.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: Deadly Deception: The Ex Factor
programme.desc: Brian Quilliams' ex-wife has been plotting to get him back for months, and their illicit Florida rendezvous unleashes a series of events that ultimately lead to bloody murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Mirror in the Basement
programme.desc: When Adele and Stephen Craven bring in handyman Rusty McIntire to remodel their suburban basement, it kicks off a chain of events that razes their marriage to the ground, rocks their trust in the people around them and ultimately has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Twisted Scripture
programme.desc: After hunters discover the dismembered body of a missing young woman, police uncover a shocking secret she kept hidden from friends. Blood spatter and incriminating receipts help investigators decode her demise at the hands of a monster.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: In 2012, 42-year-old Michelle Mockbee's beaten body was found at work. She was wearing her pink sapphire ring, so robbery was ruled out. Employees and her husband Dan were interrogated. The case stalled until video surfaced that blew it wide open.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: A teenage girl is murdered the night before her college dream was about to begin.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: When Joe Gere hears of a serial killer on the loose, he immediately packs up his family and moves. But even in their new home, Joe is vigilant, and teaches his kids to shoot and defend themselves. But it's not long before he gets the call he's dreaded.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Tooned In: Slime Splash Zone! Brooklyn v Calum v Milan
The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair
programme.desc: Continual distractions almost derail part of a science project others are depending on; a trip to the bookstore finds the comfiest chair in the world, which may have mystical powers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!
programme.desc: SpongeBob desperately tries to force out nasty sea urchin dwelling in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: The Loud House: White Hare/ Insta-Gran
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them.

programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far

programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
