programme.desc: Alex helps Jane Doe determine how the world will see her from now on. Meanwhile, George meets his new father-in-law and the hospital board begins interviewing candidates for the Chief's position.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Every Moment Counts
programme.desc: Loved by Grey's Anatomy fans for his role as Denny, actor Jeffrey Dean Morgan hosts a one-hour highlight special.

programme.title: The Closer: Fate Line
programme.desc: Brenda races against time on a multiple homicide case after finding clues on a cell phone.

programme.title: The Closer: Double Blind
programme.desc: The day has come for Brenda and Fritz to finally wed, but both are a bit preoccupied with work. While they each continue to pursue justice, entanglements on Brenda's squad are a bit too sour to resolve and it may mean someone leaving.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: A case goes sideways at trial when defense attorney Linda Rothman is able to destroy Det. Amy Syke's credibility on the stand. Helping Rothman as a defense investigation is Amy's old nemesis, Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Drop
programme.desc: Major Crimes finds a heavy body forty feet up a tree surrounded by loose pot when Dr. Morales shows up to the crime scene with his father. Meanwhile, Julio Sanchez works to obtain legal guardianship of Mark Jarvis while Andy Flynn prepares a surprise.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Sharon's son, Ricky, comes home for a surprise visit while Major Crimes investigates what looks like the 'follow home' murder of a retired LAPD fraud detective, who may have been murdered for an arrest she made decades ago.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Stiffed
programme.desc: A mortician's body is discovered in one of his own funeral home's caskets, leading the team into the world of embalming, interment and ultimately serial murder. Tommy visits with his son TJ and considers returning to Boston for good.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: You'll Never Find Him
programme.desc: 6-year-old Timmothy Pitzen vanishes after a three-day trip to waterparks and the zoo with his mom. In a terrifying twist, his mom is found dead in a motel room with a disturbing note by her side.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.desc: Doctors discover a shocking secret while treating a young mother who is dying of cancer.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: The Strange Case of Dr. Gilmer
programme.desc: A beloved physician to commits a violent murder and a doctor investigates whether a rare disease could have driven them to do it.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Deadly Bite
programme.desc: High school volleyball player Jeanna Giese complains that she’s fatigued and has numbness in her arm.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Save the Business Model!
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns shows how the successful entrepreneur rallies despite the entire business model being in jeopardy.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Taking the Reins
programme.desc: Glenn takes on the role of entrepreneurial leader when his team's plan goes up in flames just before their big debut and first chance to cash in.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: A New Empire: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns learns the outcome of his most recent venture: a barbecue restaurant that was taken from concept to completion in just 90 days.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Partners and Rivals
programme.desc: Mike repossesses a chopper from a roof while a debtor beats Ken and Danny to a helicopter.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make a Prohibition-era classic: moonshine up to an ultra-high 180 proof. Building their own stills and mash, only one can be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: BattleBots: There's No Tapping Out In BattleBots!
programme.desc: Reigning champion Tombstone takes on the legendary Gigabyte as the battles heat up to take home the renowned BattleBots trophy.

programme.title: BattleBots: This is BattleBots!
programme.desc: Champion Tombstone and newcomer Whiplash fight to finish as an advanced group of bots go head-to-head.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Duck Only A Mother Could Love
programme.desc: Elite bots Tombstone and Sawblaze go to war in the BattleBox, as the competition heats up to become the 2019 BattleBots champion.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Most Destructive Robot
programme.desc: As the tournament heats up, the field of vicious robots gear up to guarantee their spot in the Top 16. In the Main Event bout, Tombstone and Rotator look to settle a year-long feud once and for all.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lisa's Story
programme.desc: Becoming a mother early in life added to Lisa's obesity, but witnessing her brother's murder drove her to food, drugs and alcohol for comfort. Now bedridden, change is critical if she wants to live for her family.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Krystal's Journey
programme.desc: Krystal began overeating to shield herself with a protective layer of obesity after suffering years of abuse. Once a means of protection, her pathological eating now threatens to destroy her life if she doesn't get help.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Melted Candle Wax Feet
programme.desc: Cindy is desperate to have Dr. Brad fix her stumpy foot and get back to skiing. Gregory has open wounds on both feet and hopes Dr. Ebonie can heal them. Glen's feet are split down the middle, and Dr. Brad is determined to find a solution to ease his pain.

programme.title: Obesity Med
programme.desc: Single father James has life-threatening sleep apnea due to his enormous size. Amy fears she could soon become so heavy that leaving her home would be physically impossible.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Krystal's Journey
programme.desc: Krystal began overeating to shield herself with a protective layer of obesity after suffering years of abuse. Once a means of protection, her pathological eating now threatens to destroy her life if she doesn't get help.

programme.title: Obesity Med
programme.desc: Single father James has life-threatening sleep apnea due to his enormous size. Amy fears she could soon become so heavy that leaving her home would be physically impossible.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Operation Complication
programme.desc: Jazz is rushed into emergency surgery due to a major complication. While staying with Jazz for her recovery in New York, Jeannette learns Jack is fighting for his life in a health crisis of his own.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Your Girl Jazz Has a Boyfriend!
programme.desc: Three weeks after surgery, Jazz already has a boyfriend. The family is concerned that Jazz is rushing into things, but Jazz invites him to visit her in Florida.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Houston, We Have a Potty Problem
programme.desc: Danielle is ready to get the girls out of diapers and into underwear, but Adam worries about potty disasters. After months away, Mimi asks to meet up with Danielle. Adam's attempt to bond with the girls at NASA's Space Center does not go as planned.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Every Quint for Herself
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle hope teaching the Quints to share will stop their constant fighting. Blayke has a gymnastics evaluation but one wrong step may cost her the chance to move up. The Busbys step in to help a family hurt by the hurricane.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race to the Altar
programme.desc: Rita is searching for the perfect 1940's style gown to match her theme. Natalie is searching for an untraditional gown that fits her full size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Apple of His Eye
programme.desc: Missy brings her opinionated brothers to help her find the dress of her dreams. Back for her fitting, Donn longs for her brother's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn vs. Kody
programme.desc: Robyn's rental house has been sold out from under her and she has only 28 days to find a new home. There are no rentals and tensions run high as Kody insists they buy. Not wanting to slow down building homes on Coyote Pass, Robyn refuses. It's an impasse.

programme.title: Sister Wives: The Heat is On
programme.desc: A forest fire is bearing down on Meri's house and she's freaking out. Meri prepares to evacuate. Robyn is just days away from losing her rental and tensions are high with Kody. Lastly, Madison is having contractions and thinks the baby is coming tonight!

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Like a Dog in a Cage
programme.desc: A mother tries to protect her children from their father's hoard; an artist chooses frogs and banana peels over her live-in boyfriend.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Robin's Story
programme.desc: Robin and her brother Chris are both obese and already lost a sibling to obesity. They plan to visit Dr. Now together when Chris suffers a stroke and can't go. Luckily for Robin, Chris's son Garrett, already 600lbs at age 20, is game to join the journey.

programme.title: Movie: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In an attempt to win back his girlfriend, Sonny becomes a foster parent to Julian, a child his friend Kevin never knew he had. As the most unlikely parent, Sonny begins to learn what responsibility as an adult truly is.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Momma's Boy
programme.desc: In this classic 21st century love story, Andi thought Dade was cute and swiped right, but instead of just a nice date night or a one-night stand, the two Texans instantly connected and made things official almost immediately.

programme.title: The Challenge: Double Agents: Lady Vengeance
programme.desc: One Agent is put on blast after trying to appease both her alliance and her new group of friends. TJ forces the Agents to participate in his favorite game, trivia, during 'Mission: Interrogation'. Old grudges resurface as two rivals go head to head.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Tossed Aside
programme.desc: When they met at a cheer competition six years ago, Trey and Austin became instant best bros. While Trey identifies as gay and Austin is straight, the two bonded over their mutual love for cheering and always helped each other.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Jon

programme.desc: In Tulsa, a barber gets caught in the crossfire of a gang rivalry, while a young man is killed by an armed burglar in Atlanta. Plus, in Dallas, an elderly woman opens her home and pays a deadly price.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Shocking Confessions
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a key witness denies any knowledge of a brutal homicide until confronted with evidence; in Dallas, a suspect shocks detectives with an unexpected confession.

programme.title: The First 48: Dead Sleep/ Tag Team
programme.desc: Det. Ballman investigates a brutal beating death in the close-knit east end neighbourhood.

programme.title: The First 48: Better Days/ Wildflower
programme.desc: In Memphis, a cop tries to solve the murder case of a 78-year-old man shot outside his home.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Shift
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a vicious assault on a crowded barbershop leaves multiple people wounded and an innocent barber dead. Det. John Brown delves deep into a dangerous world of gang violence to catch a killer on the loose with an AK47 assault rifle.

programme.title: The First 48: Mother of Two
programme.desc: When a young mother is found naked and strangled in her car, Tulsa detective John Brown uncovers a dark obsession that may have turned deadly.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: How to Save a Life
programme.desc: This episode features a fistfight between man and kangaroo, a nasty nun-chucks nut job and a doorbell-cam date interrogation. Plus, the Interns deal with questions of life and death.

programme.desc: Our interns examine surveillance videos, including a crocodile that breaks up a swimming pool hook-up and a bruising yacht dive fail.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hopeless and Changeless

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear

programme.title: North Woods Law: Manhunt
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas races to the scene of an ATV accident. When a home is broken into, Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett assist police in tracking the suspect. Officer Bob Mancini tries to save the life of an injured loon.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Officer Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to save a stranded and injured hiker. The mysterious death of a deer is investigated, a young angler is caught in a lie, and a team is deployed to search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Officer Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to save a stranded and injured hiker. The mysterious death of a deer is investigated, a young angler is caught in a lie, and a team is deployed to search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Big Bad Woods
programme.desc: Anything can happen in Maine's 17 million acres of rugged wilderness. Angry hunters get loud with Warden Lounder over an illegal deer. Warden MacCabe enlists a 90-year-old local to help catch a deer baiter. A missing hunter sets off a full-scale search.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware
programme.desc: Fair chase is the gold standard of hunting, and in Maine, it's the law. Sgt. Simmons and Warden McKenney pursue a pair of brothers with bait piles. Warden Carter hunts for a father who may be teaching his son to poach. Warden Cross snares a trap thief.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossed Wires
programme.desc: McKenney and Robertson investigate a night hunting complaint. MacCabe tracks an illegal bear kill back to the source. K9 Tundra takes the lead in the harrowing search for a missing elderly man with dementia.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Extra Special Pets
programme.desc: Five little piggies overcome their shy nature to befriend the family dog.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Bad Max
programme.desc: Jackson works on the behavior of a hyperactive cat named Mr. Weasley. However, when this Persian cat goes down mid-play, the story takes a completely different turn; Jackson figures out how to move an exiled cat indoors.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Courtship of the Jaguars
programme.desc: Mr. Parsons the chameleon is about to meet new mate. Jaguars Napo and Goshi are being encouraged to mate, but Napo doesn't seem to be interested. Young giraffe Murchison faces the great outdoors. Nandita the 18-month-old elephant has a surprise.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bird Nest
programme.desc: An Arkansas family reaches out to Pete to build a giant bird nest treehouse. The two-story, lakefront retreat will feature driftwood railings woven to look like a living nest, and a porch for sunset bird watching sessions.

programme.title: Tanked!: Betty White's Got an App for That
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett travel to California to install an animal themed tank for Betty White. Then they install a smart phone themed tank in their own backyard.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Heights
programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Scarred
programme.desc: Sui, ready for more responsibility, tests herself by taking the lead in a rescue. An adopter looks for a dog that will feel at home around her many chickens and Tia rescues a pit bull with scars that reveal a painful past.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shock on the Bay
programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Three couples take a week-long vacation to figure out why they got married.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Four couples reflect on the past year of their marriages while on their annual vacation. Their holiday is interrupted when an ex-husband arrives with the intention of winning back his remarried wife.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: A Tough Decision
programme.desc: Four beautiful African American women navigate the zany world of dating.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Ari and David clash about Derek's growing involvement in David's campaign. Unable to track down Hazel's pre-nup, Ari, Hazel and Bree orchestrate a heist into Derek's penthouse to steal his copy of their pre-nup. Bree serves Gary with divorce papers.

programme.title: Bigger: Smack My Ass Like You Mean It
programme.desc: Layne continues to struggle with her romantic triangle, while managing opposition about her interaction with the resident homeless man coming from her vintage store's white neighbors. Deon's promotion looks more in reach.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Cleveland's Angels
programme.desc: After Cleveland gambles away Roberta's college fund, Kendra discovers that Cleveland was actually cheated out of his money and recruits Donna and Arianna for an undercover mission.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: You're the Best Man, Cleveland Brown
programme.desc: Much to his dismay, Cleveland finds out that Cleveland Jr. will inherit all of his ex-wife's belongings and that his parents, Cookie and Freight Train, plan to remarry. To add insult to injury, Freight Train dumps Cleveland as his best man for Donna's ex.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Harder, Better, Faster, Browner
programme.desc: Cleveland takes Kenny West, a single dad and struggling rapper, under his wing in attempt to prove his own prowess, after receiving surprising news about his childhood basketball camp nemesis.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Cleveland Live!
programme.desc: The audience gets a behind-the-scenes look at the 'filming' of the show. When Cleveland and Donna attempt to celebrate their anniversary, their unruly kids and disruptive friends get in the way.

programme.title: The Parkers: Love and Hisses
programme.desc: Nikki hopes to make Professor Oglevee jealous by dating one of his college friends.

programme.title: The Parkers: Love the One You're With
programme.desc: Kim adjusts to the news that Michael is a single father; Prof. Oglevee thinks about Nikki.

programme.title: The Parkers: Baby Girl
programme.desc: With Michael missing after the oil-rig fire, it falls to Kim to care for his daughter.

programme.title: The Parkers: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Professor Oglevee tries to woo Nikki from her new love with the help of Brian McKnight.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: How Cleveland Got His Groove Back
programme.desc: After his confidence is shattered, Cleveland vows to find his mojo again, and decides that a family vacation to Africa will do the trick.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: It's the Great Pancake, Cleveland Brown
programme.desc: Cleveland crushes Cleveland Jr.'s spirit when he forbids him from trick-or-treating because he thinks he is too old. Junior reinvents himself as a 'cool kid' and is invited to attend a Halloween party with Roberta.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Coach Cleveland gets greedy to win the high school baseball state championship game and turns to cheating when his star pitcher goes out for the season. He recruits Holt to pose as a transfer student to help lead the Growlers to the State Championships.

programme.desc: When a young Marine goes missing, police uncover his troubled marriage and a deadly plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Williams
programme.desc: A pretty blonde survives the attack that kills her husband.

programme.title: Snapped: Mandy Smith
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads police to his girlfriend and a host of secrets about their past.

programme.title: Snapped: Ana Gonzalez-Angulo
programme.desc: The poisoning of a prominent cancer researcher raises scandalous questions about one of his co-workers.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Dana Flynn
programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Snapped: Eve Nance
programme.desc: When a beloved Wisconsin father disappears, his wife blames drugs, but close friends suspect a violent confrontation that ended a marriage filled with secrets.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young mother and her son are found dead in a house fire. Police suspected foul play. A confession led to a guilty verdict, but what really happened during the interrogation. This is an extraordinary look inside the interview room.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Twisted Connection
programme.desc: When a suburban mom is murdered in her own home, investigators chase down an elusive killer that no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Dana Flynn
programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Snapped: She Made Me Do It: Veronica Paz
programme.desc: A star athlete is killed and burned. His on-again/ off-again lover blames her high school sweetheart. He claims she made him do it.

programme.title: Snapped: She Made Me Do It: Brittany Navarra
programme.desc: A young woman is found viciously murdered in her fiance's home and investigators struggle to understand who would have wanted the woman dead. That is, until they uncover details of a torrid love triangle.

programme.title: A Lie to Die For: Murder in Mexico
programme.desc: Lies, deception and a love triangle lead to the murder of a wealthy American on a desolate road in Mexico.

programme.title: A Lie to Die For: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: When a young Marine goes missing, NCIS agents uncover a tragic mystery that stuns a Virginia Beach naval base. How can an online love affair result in the murder of an innocent victim?

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Tangled Web
programme.desc: After a young woman vanishes from her neighborhood, North Carolina detectives are snared in a tangled web of deceit as they uncover a vicious love triangle. It's a race against time to find a killer and the evidence they need to solve a dark mystery.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: A Deadly Plea
programme.desc: When a long held secret in Florida threatens to expose a deadly truth, investigators work to unravel a baffling mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Movie: Searching
programme.desc: After his teenage daughter goes missing, a father begins scouring the contents of her laptop and online presence in a search for clues that can help him find her, but he soon discovers that he doesn't know his daughter as well as he'd thought.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: Movie: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six complete strangers all receive invitations to test out a new escape room, with $1 million up for grabs if they can find their way out, but once inside they discover that its puzzles are sadistically designed and are killing them off one by one.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Long Time Listener, First Time Bob
programme.desc: Bob meets his personal hero a renegade radio DJ who refuses to compromise. However, the Belchers get in over their heads when they try to help him stage a comeback.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
programme.desc: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side. Meanwhile, Bob takes pity on a flyer guy who's handing out flyers in front of the restaurant.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Gene Mile
programme.desc: When the kids have to run a mandatory mile for school on free-ice-cream-day, they hatch an elaborate plot to sneak away. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda frantically try to secure discount tickets to a show at the Wharf Arts Center.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: P.T.A It Ain't So
programme.desc: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yes Without My Zeke
programme.desc: When Zeke gets in trouble, the Belcher kids and Jimmy Jr. pitch in to help prevent him being sent to a disciplinary school. However, Tina tries to thwart their mission, so she can have Jimmy Jr. and his butt all to herself.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Boys Just Wanna Have Fungus

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis and Dee Go on Welfare

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Bangs Dennis' Mom
programme.desc: Jealous of Frank's newfound happiness, Barbara gets back at him by having sex with Mac. The gang uses sex for their own purposes, setting in motion a series of back-stabbing and deceptive moves.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Hundred Dollar Baby
programme.desc: After Dee gets mugged, she agrees to take boxing lessons from Frank, who is thrilled with the idea of reliving his glory days as a professional fighter. Meanwhile, Mac and Dennis plan to make some cash by entering Charlie in underground fighting matches.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gives Back
programme.desc: After the arson mishap gets them arrested, Charlie, Mac, Dennis and Dee are sentenced to community service. During their services, Charlie makes another attempt to win The Waitress' affection when he discovers that they share something in common.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Forbidden Lair of the Yeti
programme.desc: Experts will try to confirm if they've uncovered new evidence of the Yeti using cutting-edge technology on a dangerous expedition to a remote land in the Himalayas to investigate reports of mysterious giant.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Key to Murder
programme.desc: Melinda Snyder's death stunned Rock Hill, SC, where even her closest friends came into question. The former homecoming queen's murder embroiled the quiet town in a mystery that wouldn't be settled until the South Carolina Supreme Court weighed in.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls
programme.desc: Tensions arise when a new addition to the Finkle family shakes up their peaceful dynamic, but no one could predict the fatal and gruesome results to come.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: The Millionaire's Mistress
programme.desc: When 41-year-old Lance Herndon is found brutally murdered, no one in Roswell, Georgia knows what to think. To everyone around him, he appeared to be living the American dream.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Facing Evil: A Military Affair
programme.desc: Kimberly Parker is convicted of masterminding the July 2000 kidnapping and murder of her estranged husband, Elihue Parker. She was sentenced to 99 years for aggravated kidnapping. She admits guilt but wasn't there when the trigger was pulled.

programme.title: Facing Evil: For Love of Oneself
programme.desc: Susan Grund found her husband dead in their home, saying it was a burglary gone wrong. But the story didn't add up. Susan Grund was found guilty of murder and sentenced to 60 years in jail. Now she tells her story to former FBI profiler Candace DeLong.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Sister's Suspicion
programme.desc: When married mother of two Debbie Groseclose disappears without a trace, law enforcement are left mystified as to her whereabouts. With no evidence and no witnesses, it is up to Debbie's family to follow their suspicions and catch her killer.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Perils of Paranoia
programme.desc: A bored teenager looking for trouble finally finds it after becoming pregnant. After many struggles, Heather finds stability in a woman named Terri. When Terri isn't giving Heather the attention and loyalty she needs, things turn deadly.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: I Slay
programme.desc: After surviving a brutal gang attack at 17, Lashonda Woodard vows to never let anyone hurt her again. Over the next several years, she falls in love with three different men. But each time they instigate violence, she fights back...with a knife.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Newlydead
programme.desc: Sharon Nelson wanted it all: love, sex and money. When she sets her sights on a handsome doctor, it doesn't matter that he's married with children. Soon, she carves a devastating path filled with broken hearts, broken dreams and dead bodies.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Twisted Fate
programme.desc: On March 1, 1975, firefighters discover the naked, burned body of Sherry Gibson in an abandoned farmhouse. After a chilling confession, officials believe the case is finally closed until they receive a shocking revelation 26 years later.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Axe to Grind
programme.desc: Lancaster, Texas is rocked by the brutal triple murder of Donna Jester, her mother Dalpha, and boarder Laura Owen. Donna's diary describes her penchant for picking up hitchhikers, one of whom just may be responsible for this heinous crime.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A suspicious gun store robbery in Maryland piques the interest of the ATF, and ignites an investigation into violence, arson, and murder. As detectives zero in on the suspect, they find themselves face-to-face with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Home Protection
programme.desc: Signe Edwards is a true-blue Texan. But when an injury forces her off the saddle, she relies on a series of handymen and sketchy online acquaintances for help around the house. One of them will betray her in the most horrific way.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Single Mom Missing
programme.desc: 31-year-old mother of two Michelle Warner vanishes without a trace from her apartment in Houston that she shares with her ex. With no concrete proof of anything untoward, police are left with a hunch that her checkered past has reared its ugly head.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.desc: A laboratory mishap exposes Jimmy, Carl and Sheen to a powerful love potion.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Stranded
programme.desc: An argument between Jimmy and Cindy leaves them stranded together.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: Study Muffin/ Homespun
programme.desc: The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Return to Roblox High School
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb-Busters!/ Not Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Irving's brother, Albert, claims to be the 'Truth Detector' and Candice enlists friends.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bounty / The Ball
programme.desc: Hater hires a bunch of bounty hunters to capture Wander but Peepers tries to thwart them so he can have all the glory to himself.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Fremergency Fronfract / The Boy Wander
programme.desc: When Wander picks up a loopy Lord Hater from the dentist, he spends the day showing Hater how much fun being good can be. Then, Wander heroically faces a ridiculous villain from his past who no one takes seriously.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Picnic/ The Fugitives
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia are fugitives on a distant planet, but Wander keeps messing up Sylvia's escape plans to come to the aid of strangers who need help.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Gift II: The Giftening/ The Gift
programme.desc: Mysterious gifts start popping up on Lord Hater's ship, zombie-fying each recipient with gratitude. Hater and Peepers try to escape the creeping terror delivering these gifts.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Cool Guy/ The Catastrophe
programme.desc: Lord Hater ditches Peepers to party with Emperor Awesome. Then, Sylvia discovers Wander's new obsession with funny cat videos is part of a more fiendish viral plot.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Rager / The Good Bad Guy
programme.desc: Lord Hater tries to crash the party Wander throws for the deposed rulers in Hater's prison. Then, Lord Hater finally gets to meet his villain hero, Major Threat.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flying High! Harmony Pegasus!
programme.desc: Tango decides to take the Victories on a training journey to battle more powerful Bladers. While Dante meets with the mysterious Pheng Hope, Delta challenges the artistic Blindt DeVoy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Intersection
programme.desc: As the war between bikes and cars escalates, Acting Assistant Chief Fritz Howard deploys Major Crimes to solve a tragic hit and run. Lt. Provenza, frustrated by the never-ending contest to succeed Russell Traylor, contemplates retirement.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Shockwave
programme.desc: A murder investigation turns explosive while Captain Sharon Raydor duels with Chief Winnie Davis for control of her case as she and her squad try to determine if they are dealing with a terrorist.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Shockwave
programme.desc: After discovering the identity of the bomber her division has been searching for, Sharon Raydor and the Major Crimes squad struggle to determine his next target.

programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.
