programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Family Curse
programme.desc: A rare genetic disease causes fatal insomnia.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: BattleBots: Like a Bot to a Flame
programme.desc: As the Top 16 looms closer, a group of underdogs gives it their last shot, and in the Main Event, Rotator and undefeated Death Roll bring everything they have to the BattleBox.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never
programme.desc: Tonight every fight has Championship consequences. In the Main Event, Copperhead and Black Dragon battle for high seedings, and all the rest are fighting for survival. A win means life and a loss and it's time to power down for good.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never
programme.desc: Copperhead and Black Dragon battle it out for high seedings in the Main Event. A win means life but anything else means total power loss.

programme.title: BattleBots: Qualify! Or Wave Goodbye!
programme.desc: The World Championship qualifiers reach their climax, with Hydra facing Uppercut and Whiplash against Valkyrie in two ferocious final battles. Only then can the top 32 finalists finally be revealed.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Family Affair
programme.desc: The stakes get higher when teams on the brink start to feel the heat, and as the clash continues, undefeated bots Son of Whyachi and the Ewerts look to continue their reign of terror.

programme.title: BattleBots: Qualify! Or Wave Goodbye!
programme.desc: The World Championship qualifiers reach their climax, with Hydra facing Uppercut and Whiplash against Valkyrie in two ferocious final battles. Only then can the top 32 finalists finally be revealed.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Family Affair
programme.desc: The stakes get higher when teams on the brink start to feel the heat, and as the clash continues, undefeated bots Son of Whyachi and the Ewerts look to continue their reign of terror.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Pile It On
programme.desc: The Browns start building their home on their remote land in Alaska. They have to float the foundation pilings to their land and suffer a setback when a big storm hits. Oldest brother Matt creates a new home for himself.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: On the Prowl
programme.desc: Billy strikes a barter for windows for their new home. Matt and Noah check the local junkyard for additional materials. While grabbing lunch in town, the boys meet some local girls and invite them back to their property for a unique style of bush dating.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Home Alone
programme.desc: After discovering rogue bears near their home site, the Browns beef up their defenses. Billy falls seriously ill and is forced to seek medical help. The kids are left to fend for themselves and build a large raft to help move lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Now or Never
programme.desc: As the Browns struggle to get the walls and roof of their house built, winter arrives. While working through the snow, a series of setbacks threatens to derail all they've worked hard to achieve.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Wolfpack Divided
programme.desc: The Brown family is ready to move into their new home when Ami requires immediate medical attention and must travel to a big city for surgery. Meanwhile, the pressure is on the boys to secure a wood-burning stove so the family can stay warm over winter.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rise of Browntown
programme.desc: The Browns move into their new home and look toward the future. After living in the same house as the family for 32 years, Matt creates his own one-of-a-kind tire house. Ami enlists the help of an Alaskan matchmaker to find mates for her five grown boys.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Nearing the end of hunting season, Matt and Bam must bring back meat for the family while the other Brown kids venture into new territory in search of egg-laying chickens. 27-year-old Bear goes out on his first official date ever.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hell's Crack
programme.desc: Parker and his team face a treacherous river, extreme heat, and machine breakdowns for a shot at $100 million in gold at Hell's Crack.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Honey Pot
programme.desc: Hunting for a huge payday in Tyler's hometown of Sandstone, the team encounters a dangerous new method for extracting gold and Parker must decide if the risk is worth the reward.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine, Moment, Machine
programme.desc: Parker makes a gamble on dry-mining equipment to test the gold-rich ground of Western Australia. A case of gold fever proves costly, and Parker nearly loses a team member.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hard Rock Risks
programme.desc: Tyler leads Parker to a promising hard rock mine where they detonate high explosives to gauge if the rewards of underground mining justify the risks.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Future Ground
programme.desc: Parker travels deep into the 'Super Pit' gold mine, stakes a new claim, and makes a big decision that could change his mining career. To jump start his season, Rick Ness reunites his crew for a high-octane 500-mile ice race that ends with a big surprise.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in the Time of Corona
programme.desc: To keep boredom at bay during the summer quarantine, the kids rope Trent and Amber into viral video challenges. It's great family fun, but the cabin fever is putting a cramp in Trent and Amber's bedroom life, so they decide to try a pole dancing class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Did Somebody Shrink You?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber surprise Emma and Alex with a go kart so that they can practice driving. Meanwhile, Elizabeth is making big strides in her nursing career, but she is not happy to see her younger siblings behind the wheel before she has her own license.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Gay and Religious
programme.desc: The sister wives visit Mariah and her fiancée, Audrey, in Chicago. Meri opens up about how badly she behaved when Mariah first came out as gay and Mariah confesses about her struggles growing up gay in their polygamist church.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn vs. Kody
programme.desc: Robyn's rental house has been sold out from under her and she has only 28 days to find a new home. There are no rentals and tensions run high as Kody insists they buy. Not wanting to slow down building homes on Coyote Pass, Robyn refuses. It's an impasse.

programme.title: Sister Wives: The Heat is On
programme.desc: A forest fire is bearing down on Meri's house and she's freaking out. Meri prepares to evacuate. Robyn is just days away from losing her rental and tensions are high with Kody. Lastly, Madison is having contractions and thinks the baby is coming tonight!

programme.title: Sister Wives: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Maddie thinks she's in labour, but it's a false alarm, so Kody heads back to Flagstaff. Kody and Robyn are at wits' end over their struggle to close on her house. Then, Kody and Meri head to their therapist in Vegas, where the brutal truth comes out.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Two Moms, Their Daughter, and a Baby
programme.desc: Kody and Robyn are struggling with the bank as the mortgage process is not designed for plural marriage. Then in North Carolina, Maddie's water breaks, at the mall. Evie K is born, but when she has problems breathing, an ambulance is called.

programme.desc: Jazz's boyfriend, Ahmir, visits. While Jazz learns to kiss and falls for Ahmir more and more, her friends have major concerns. Dr. Bowers asks the Jennings to fly to NYC so Jazz can be examined ASAP. Jazz goes missing and her parents fear the worst.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: I Want to Meet Your (Transphobic) Mom
programme.desc: Jazz's relationship is put to the test when she learns that Ahmir has a transphobic mother. Dr. Bowers comes to Florida to see if Jazz needs a more extensive surgery. Jazz wants to move out of her house, and tries to convince Ari they should be roommates.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Our Home Is Sick
programme.desc: The quints have their first sleepover at the Mills when the Busbys are forced to leave their home for a few days. Fearing for the girls' health after prolonged exposure to mold, Danielle and Adam bring them to the doctor to find out if they are at risk.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Get Schooled
programme.desc: Thanksgiving is right around the corner, but celebrating is the last thing on the Busbys' minds. Tensions run high between Adam and Danielle as they continue the hunt for a new house and the quints undergo their first school testing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting
programme.desc: Emily, a rock star by night, wants to shake her all-black attire for a traditional gown. Brittany has bright red hair and tattoos and wants to show them off in a sexy lace gown. Lauren is nervous that her friends will think her dress is too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: Daddy's girl, Katie, comes to the salon hoping to find the perfect mermaid style dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Had in Mind
programme.desc: LaQuet is looking for a fun gown with straps. Kat wants a one-of-a-kind dress with no sweetheart neckline, but the consultants put her in one anyway. Valerie wants a mermaid silhouette until she realizes they may not be for her.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Maddie thinks she's in labour, but it's a false alarm, so Kody heads back to Flagstaff. Kody and Robyn are at wits' end over their struggle to close on her house. Then, Kody and Meri head to their therapist in Vegas, where the brutal truth comes out.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Two Moms, Their Daughter, and a Baby
programme.desc: Kody and Robyn are struggling with the bank as the mortgage process is not designed for plural marriage. Then in North Carolina, Maddie's water breaks, at the mall. Evie K is born, but when she has problems breathing, an ambulance is called.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: On the Road: Texas
programme.desc: They say everything is bigger in Texas, and Theresa and Larry's trip there is no exception. Big surprises and big moments unfold as Theresa hits the road again to surprise fans with readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Block Party!
programme.desc: Theresa finds herself reflective as she undertakes two huge events: her largest-ever fundraiser group reading, and the return of her neighborhood block party. And, Theresa turns a skeptic into a believer when she channels a long-deceased spirit.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Is the Gift Real?
programme.desc: At a group reading, Theresa brings closure to a man who has been tortured by his son's death. Theresa gets a brain scan while she's channeling, in the hopes doctors can tell her what goes on in her head when she's channeling spirit.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Knock, Knock, It's Theresa!
programme.desc: Theresa surprises people with readings set up by their friends and family. From a salon to a doughnut shop to pretending to be a substitute babysitter, Theresa is showing up in the most unlikely places to deliver healing.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: Grease
programme.desc: A leather-jacketed boy and a goody-two-shoes girl fall in and out of love in the 1950s.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Nama-stay Ghosted
programme.desc: Tini met Bri through a spiritual group, and the two immediately hit it off. Bri was going through hardships at that time in her life, and the two connected over their mutual interest in spirituality and self-healing.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Calling Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr. Drew helps mediate the conflict between Angelina and Jenni, and a messy situation is about to get messier when Deena learns her private conversation with Mike wasn't so private. Mike and Lauren get the best news of their lives.

programme.title: Revenge Prank With DJ Pauly D and Vinny: The Prank that Works Out
programme.desc: Vinny helps Andrea get revenge on her husband Seth for sixteen years of pranks by setting him up with a personal training session with a spoiled teenage client.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Momma's Boy

programme.title: Rescue Cam

programme.title: Rescue Cam

programme.title: Rescue Cam
programme.desc: Two skydiving planes collide in mid-air, and an unconscious man is rescued from drowning in a creek. Plus, a man jumps into a car to save a man having a seizure.

programme.title: Rescue Cam

programme.title: Rescue Cam

programme.title: Rescue Cam

programme.title: The First 48: Shooting Spree/ Lady in the Fire
programme.desc: In Detroit, Anthony Wright Jr. investigates the death of a man found shot behind an abandoned house. Also, Sergeant Kevin Lundy in Memphis tries to solve the murder of a woman found dead inside a house after a fire.

programme.title: The First 48: Motel No-Tell/ Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In Memphis, Sergeants Ron Collins and Kevin Lundy must track down a murder suspect who may have fled the state. In Dallas, Det. Phil Harding investigates the brutal shooting that killed a 22-year-old.

programme.title: The First 48: 6,000 Motives/ Deadly Gamble
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the brutal stabbing death of an elderly man in his home, and also investigate the murder of a woman shot during a robbery of her illegal game room.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Words/ Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is beaten and shot in the middle of a housing complex during the day. An 18-year-old male is gunned down in an apartment complex.

programme.title: The First 48: The Girl Who Knew Too Much/ The Guardian
programme.desc: In Dallas, an unidentified girl is found brutally shot in a field, and may have been killed for her silence. Then in Cleveland, a young father is shot in the head trying to break up a fight.

programme.title: The First 48: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is executed on a street corner, investigator Nathan Schilling discovers her circle of friends may all be connected to the murder.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Eat, Flay, Love
programme.desc: Catering queen Kimberly Van Kline and the king of his own culinary castle, Christopher Lee, compete for the royal jewel: a chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Fear
programme.desc: The stars align when Damaris Phillips teams up with Alex Guarnaschelli in this battle of culinary gladiators. New England bad boy Will Gilson brings his modern cuisine against the fusion fare of former Navy Seal, chef Lawrence Males.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby's DMV Appointment
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff and Food Network's Curtis Stone aim to knock their friend Bobby Flay down a couple of pegs. Washington D.C. veteran Todd Gray and Maryland's French-trained Gabonese caterer Serge Pambo go head to head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Comforts of Home
programme.desc: Jackie Rothong takes on Matteo Boffo, each hoping to send the other one packing early.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's Gonna Be Jarring
programme.desc: Style expert Carson Kressley teams up with Chef Anne Burrell to point out Bobby Flay's fashion and food faux pas. Two Italian authorities, chefs Kevin Sweeney and Nicco Muratore, are ready to prove that their food is trendsetting.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skirting By
programme.desc: It's an East coast battle when Rhode Island's Robert Sisca and Atlantic City's Michael Brennan duke it out in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shaken, Not Stirred
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Giada De Laurentiis team up to bring in two talented chefs who won't back down: Italian chef Giulio Adriani and Texan chef Kristine Kittrell.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: Actor and Food Network superfan Ben Rappaport teams up with Amanda Freitag for a special behind-the-scenes episode. Things get personal when two people who know Bobby Flay better than anyone try to beat their boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF: Beat my Best Friend
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon enlists his pal, TV host Clinton Kelly, to distract Bobby Flay with their friendship. They get additional help from a French master, Chef Sylvain Delpique, and an Italian bread master, Chef Jackie Mazza.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It Must've Been Love
programme.desc: Proving that couples can be competitive, Chef Ricardo Castro and his wife, Chef Rosana Rivera, challenge each other for a chance to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Lady Butchers
programme.desc: Meat enthusiast Courtney Rada and Iron Chef Michael Symon source Cleveland chefs Penny Barend and Melissa Khoury to bring Bobby Flay down. These lady butchers are ready to slice and dice the competition.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: To Catch a Poacher
programme.desc: A team of Wardens deploy on a multi-county night operation to stop spotlighters and road hunters. Texas Game Wardens check teal hunters on opening weekend. A dead deer found with an arrow still in it leads Game Wardens to a poacher.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Dog
programme.desc: Dove season starts off with a bang, keeping wardens across the state busy from sunrise to sundown. Texas Game Wardens must relocate a 500-lb gator that's loose in a suburban area. Wardens uncover a large marijuana grow-op hidden in a wildlife preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Life of the Party
programme.desc: A group of anglers are caught bending the rules, and turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island. Later, holiday weekend is in full swing and partygoers are caught tangled in a fistfight, while Warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Life of the Party
programme.desc: A group of anglers are caught bending the rules, and turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island. Later, holiday weekend is in full swing and partygoers are caught tangled in a fistfight, while Warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Everything in the Pacific Northwest is bigger, including the K-9 units who need to be able to match forces with the resident bears when they need to be driven away from populated areas for their own safety.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Outgunned
programme.desc: The Washington Fish & Game Police deal with more armed suspects than the average beat cop. When one officer encounters a group of hunters who may be breaking the law they quickly find themselves outnumbered.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluff and Feathers
programme.desc: A Pomeranian pup struggles to make friends until he meets some baby chicks his own size.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jekyll and Hyde Cat
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple with a blind cat who's suffering from living in a chaotic environment. He then visits a Jekyl and Hyde cat, Jude, that's a darling during the day, but a nightmare at night.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Rhino Due Date
programme.desc: Eastern black rhino Kitani is due to give birth, and help swell the ranks of this endangered species. However, with Kitani having lost three previous calves, it's a worrying time. Keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Towering Treetop Teahouse
programme.desc: A family needs Pete's help to create a traditional Japanese teahouse treehouse to complete a zen-like paradise in their backyard. Pete and his crew adopt Buddha's teachings in order to build this inspiring project 20 ft. high in a massive cedar tree.

programme.title: Tanked!: Playing Favourites
programme.desc: Six of ATM's employees, Brett, Wayde, Heather, Agnes, Redneck and the General, take a walk down memory lane with each of their favourite tanks.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Jail Break
programme.desc: A challenge comes in the form of a stray dog stuck in the swamp, Tia takes in two sickly puppies from an overwhelmed owner, and one of Villalobos favourite residents finally finds a chance at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: A New Hampshire family travels south to find a new family companion, a call about an aggressive dog leads to a heartbreaking discovery, and Earl visits a spine specialist to try to put an end to years of pain.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Four couples reflect on the past year of their marriages while on their annual vacation. Their holiday is interrupted when an ex-husband arrives with the intention of winning back his remarried wife.

programme.title: Movie: Notorious
programme.desc: Rapping on the streets of Brooklyn, Chris Wallace discovered his love and gift for song writing. On his way to the top, lies and confusion ended his life early.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Murray Christmas
programme.desc: When Rallo's teacher forces him to spend the weekend at a retirement home to get to know the senior citizens during the holidays, he meets Murray, who teaches him about Hanukkah.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Ain't Nothin' but Mutton Bustin'

programme.desc: Nikki lands an internship and becomes convinced her boss is a mobster out to kill her.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Revolution
programme.desc: Nikki and Professor Oglevee decide to educate the gang about Rev. Martin Luther King Jr.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Architectural Opportunities
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Eric and Lindsey flip one of the city's Alexander homes that has lost most of its original charm. Meanwhile in Anaheim, Tarek and Christina get the chance to revive a house designed by influential midcentury architect Cliff May.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Ratty Flips
programme.desc: In Indianapolis, Mina and Karen take on a brick house with overgrown landscaping on the outside and animal droppings on the inside. Meanwhile in Fort Worth, Texas, Andy and Ashley flip a house damaged by a fallen tree and a rat infestation.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Hidden Issues
programme.desc: Page and DeRon find themselves dealing with a basement full of water damage that threatens their flip in Nashville. Meanwhile, Jon and Mary have to deal with copper-wire theft and pet damage to a home's restored hardwood floors in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: New Nest, Who This?

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udderly Frozen

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Predator Weapons
programme.desc: How predators have evolved specific weapons to make them efficient killing machines.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Predator Superpowers

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison

programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Antarctic Trail of Doom
programme.desc: The Scott Antarctic Expedition aspired to conquer the South Pole before anyone else, but this great endeavor of exploration never returned; now, newly uncovered evidence suggests this team may have succumbed to something more sinister than harsh elements.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates the double life of Mike Bullinger. Callahan Walsh investigates the case of Tomas Magallon Gonzalez.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Feud on the Frontier
programme.desc: Two neighboring frontiersmen get along great until one's dog frightens the other's daughter and grandson. It's soon all out war that will leave one of them shot dead and the other in a white knuckle standoff with police.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Panic Room
programme.desc: Two old friends reconnect when they end up renting a house a house together from an absentee landlord. But familiarity quickly turns into frustration, and an abusive relationship escalates to a violent death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.desc: When the battered corpse of a young woman turns up on the outskirts of Fallbrook, California, detectives unravel a secret world where dominance, sadomasochism, and manipulation reign.

programme.desc: When the strangled body of 21-year-old Susan Schumake was found in Carbondale, Illinois, lack of evidence stumped the police for more than two decades, but new technology lead detectives in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: My Friend, the End
programme.desc: When 18 year-old Harmahn Smith goes missing, his parents call on the CMPD to find him. Detectives run down every lead searching for the teenager, ultimately discovering the terrible details of what had begun for Harmahn as an uneventful night out.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: Running with the Devil
programme.desc: Three years after a young mother goes missing in Florida, a jailhouse confession promises to bring answers. That is, until Special Agent Dennis Haley uncovers a key witness who's hiding a big secret.

programme.title: Disappeared: Spirited Away
programme.desc: Twenty-one year-old Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed one night following a couple of scuffles with neighbors and friends. Investigators pursue various leads, but the young beauty is nowhere to be found, and her family clings to an endless hope.

programme.title: Disappeared: Every Mother's Son
programme.desc: 20-year old Bear Diaz has diabetes, leaving him weak and vulnerable. When he vanishes in the night with his TV, backpack and cash, investigators must consider foul play. Then Skylar Tosic disappears, leaving people wondering if the cases are linked.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: Blood Runs Cold: The Secret
programme.desc: The 1999 murder of a 17-year-old sends shockwaves across a rural Kentucky community. When the police investigation stalls, her family vows to solve it themselves. But in their long hunt for justice, they discover that evil is sickeningly close to home.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In Colorado, a 911 dispatcher receives a call from a woman in distress. Seven-months pregnant, another woman has slashed her throat. As the dispatcher uncovers the horrific event linking these women, she forges a fast friendship with the victim.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Green Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: As children, Darlene and Charlene Shuler lived modest lives in South Carolina. But as adults, they lived very lavishly. Insatiable greed and deceit between the sisters ran rampant. Eventually, their bond would be shattered by a single gunshot.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Deadly Role Play
programme.desc: Anita Smithey appears trapped in an abusive marriage, until Robert Cline comes along. After a fresh start with his family, Anita seems to feel safe. But she soon reveals a dark side to her new step kids. And the prey becomes the ultimate predator.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise

programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I, Monster
programme.desc: The turtles must face off against a new enemy, the Rat King, who threatens to take control of the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Alien Agenda
programme.desc: April's school project draws Kraang attention.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer
programme.desc: A fanboy dresses up as 'The Pulverizer' and decides to fight crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Enter the Dragons: Part 2
programme.desc: With help of their allies the Turtles battle their way through New York to fight Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Cockroach Terminator
programme.desc: As the Turtles try to foil a Kraang invasion plot, they are hunted by a giant, indestructible cockroach.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Baxter's Gambit
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman takes revenge on both Fishface and the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Enemy of My Enemy
programme.desc: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai comes to realize the seriousness of an alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Karai's Vendetta
programme.desc: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer Returns
programme.desc: When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Parasitica
programme.desc: Michelangelo must save his brothers after they fall under the control of a parasitic wasp.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Break Out
programme.desc: Donatello breaks into a secret Kraang detention center in order to rescue Kirby O'Neil. But when he discovers they are trapped inside with a deadly mutant prisoner, he realizes that breaking in was the easy part.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.
